title: 5. Basic Acupuncture Techniques: Photographic Guide (2019)
text:
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
~ ! ~
6
PREFACE
Acupuncture  is  a  very  safe  and  cost-effective  cosmetic
procedure. It has more than two thousand years of history as a
form of cosmetic treatment. Most of all, the cosmetic intervention
involves not just skin care, but also general health care, because
TCM does not see cosmetics and systemic health as separate.
Cosmetic acupuncture goes beyond conventional cosmetics and
encompasses the patient's physical and mental health.
Cosmetic acupuncture has a good prospects and potential,
both academically and practically. More and more herb-derived
cosmetic products have been coming in Korea, and such Korean
products  are  becoming  popular  all  over  the  world.  Korean
cosmetic acupuncture techniques are developing into a new ﬁeld
with  procedures  like  transplanting  a  surgical  thread  and  the
injection of herbal extracts. The publication of related articles is
increasing in peer-reviewed journals.
I  have  spent  25  years  as  an  acupuncturist  and  OMD
specializing in women's health, obesity, infertility, menopausal
symptoms, and cosmetics. I loved introducing the techniques of
Korean  cosmetic  acupuncture  in  this  book,  including
comprehensive approaches like diet, daily living modiﬁcation,
and meditation. I only picked techniques already authorized in
the U.S. I tried my best to make this book practical and clinical.
The choice of acupuncture needles, depth of the needles, and
insertion techniques are described in as much detail as possible
because there has been great deal of demand from my students
and apprentices. Also, I included clinical issues like side-effects,
the  organization  of  treatment  sessions,  arranging  a  treatment
room, and handling of problems with patients in actual practice.
I would like to emphasize that this book is the result of my
personal practice and experience, not general theories. I hope this
book guides you through your cosmetic acupuncture practice.
Thank you.
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
